data.description:
## Goal
Prevent Codex epic executions from misdiagnosing working Gerrit credentials when REST polling uses curl.

## Plan
Add lean Codex-specific contributor guidance that Gerrit HTTPS credentials stored by the configured Git credential helper must be obtained through git credential fill for authenticated /a/ REST calls; curl --netrc is not an equivalent check unless .netrc was explicitly configured. Preserve secret redaction and keep normal git push guidance unchanged.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AGENTS.md or the authoritative contributor doc states the safe credential-helper REST pattern for non-interactive Codex.
- [ ] The example never prints the password and explains that a --netrc 401 does not invalidate credentials already working for git-over-HTTPS.
- [ ] Documentation checks pass.
data.title: Document Codex Gerrit REST credential reuse
